2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

TLPL250 Historical and Philosophical Perspectives on Education (3 Credits)

An examination of illustrative historical and philosophical examples of the interplay of ideas and events in the shaping of educational aims and practices from ancient cultures to modern technological societies. Credit Only Granted for: EDPS210 or TLPL250.
